welcome, bvwtgt.xyz is the work of tim taylor //

before twenty-twenty-one tim was a luthier, craftsman, woodworker, chef, and musician; { gallery of some examples of his work }

today, he is an musician/developer focusing on technology & sound

his interests include synthesis/sound/instrument design, iterative processes, balancing intuition with intentionality, the electric guitar, chess, baking, poetry, the Boston Celtics, and film

some recent projects:

  • { music on bandcamp } or { streamed on spotify }
  • { blog following the learning process of making Reason Rack Extension }
  • { sequencers for monome crow written in lua }

There has been a common thread throughout my life for the need to examine the constructed world. That is: the structures we create around us and boundaries we share with nature, and the different cultures/philosophies behind those partitions.

contact @ tim [at] bvwtgt [dot] xyz
